title: New York investment firm acquires Fort Wayne Metals
description:
Axel Johnson Inc., a New York-based investment company, said Wednesday it has completed its acquisition of Fort Wayne Metals, though financial terms are not being disclosed.

title: Development agreement for $7B data center in Hammond expires
description: The city of Hammond announced a development agreement for a proposed $7 billion data center project has expired. The agreement with Chicago-based developer Decennial was originally signed in June 2025 but has seen delays

title: Indy advances data center zoning district, ignores calls for moratorium
description:
The Metropolitan Development Commission in Indianapolis approved a special zoning district for data centers Wednesday that includes some guardrails and reporting requirements.

title: Unemployment repayment letters confuse Hoosiers amid fraud ‘cleanup’
description:
The Indiana Department of Workforce Development recently sent more than 1,000 letters seeking refunds for unemployment benefit overpayments made during the pandemic.

title: Northern Indiana state forests now under Indiana State Parks control
description: Effective Wednesday, the nearly 900-acre Salamonie River State Forest near Lagro will be managed as part of Salamonie Lake, and the 515-acre Frances Slocum State Forest near Peru will be managed through Mississinewa Lake

title: Holiday World unveils ‘Cannonball!’ water roller coaster
description: Holiday World & Splashin' Safari has unveiled designs for its newest attraction, the Cannonball! water roller coaster. The amusement park is investing $22 million in the ride, which represents the largest, single-at

title: Indiana joins federal Workforce Pell Grant program with Ivy Tech, Vincennes
description:
Indiana will be part of a new federal initiative called the Workforce Pell Grant program that will allow student aid to be used for job-training opportunities, the Governor’s Office announced Wednesday.

title: Prime Beverage Group to establish production facility in Shelby County
description:
Prime Beverage Group said in a news release it has secured approvals to establish a state-of-the-art beverage production facility in the Velocity 74 Trade Center in Fairland.

title: Kroger buying regional grocer and pharmacy retailer Giant Eagle
description:
Giant Eagle, which is privately held, has 197 supermarkets and 11 standalone pharmacies across northern Ohio, western Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland and Indiana.

title: $2M in governor’s office salaries bankrolled by other state agencies
